Based on data reported by banking department of NRB, commercial banks conducting government transactions and report released from 81 DTCOs and payment centres. Expenditure excludes unrealized cheques and direct payments.
Expenditure includes Federal Government only whereas revenue mobilization includes Federal Government revenue plus the amount transferable to province and local governments
Revenue includes Federal Government revenue plus the amount transferable to provincial and local governments.
Provincial Government resources include grants and revenue transfer from Federal Government, and resources collected by provincial governments.
